meaning: n.单人乘座轻马车的一种,印刷机的一种
examples: When you lived on Stanhope Road.
Two days ago, you went to the Stanhope for lunch?
If asked, she would have said that Charlotte Stanhope was her especial friend.
Thus, cars make obsolete the horse economy, including livery stables, wheelwrights, Stanhope manufacturing, muleteers, and coachmen.
Consider the 177, 000-square-foot office building in London's financial district that Mitsui is planning to develop with Stanhope PLC.
